name: Martha's Chiles Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1 Separate an egg into whites and yolks.
2 For each whole chili, mix 1 tablespoon flour with the yolk.
3 Heat 1½ inches (3.8 cm) of oil in a skillet.
4 Cut the cheese into oval pieces about 1 inch wide and 2 inches long.
5 Stuff the chiles with the cheese pieces.
6 Dip the stuffed chiles in the egg wash, then coat them in flour.
7 Gently lower the chiles into the hot oil.
8 Fry until golden brown on both sides.
9 Serve immediately, topped with Ranchero Sauce (recipe to be posted).
10 Note: If using fresh chiles, char them over an open flame or under the broiler. Steam and remove the skins before stuffing.
11 This recipe was shared by Martha Campbell, a Mexican cook who lived next door in the 1950s.
